name: Seafood and Shells
recipeIngredient: 1 7 Oz Pkg. Tiny Shells Or Cavatelli, uncooked
1 Cup (4 Oz) Monterrey Jack Cheese, shredded
1 Can 6 1/2 Oz. Clams Minced And Undrained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to directions. Rinse under cold water and set aside.
2. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Add celery, onion, and garlic. Saute for 3 minutes.
3. Add flour, stir until smooth. Gradually add milk; cook over medium heat stirring constantly until thickened.
4. Stir in cheese until melted. Stir in shrimp, clams, parsley, and sherry.
5. Stir in pasta.
